# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv-style research manuscript with original empirical substance, including field observations of 13 experienced developers and a qualitative survey of 99 experienced developers, plus explicit study design, recruitment criteria, procedures, and reported findings about real-world AI agent use in software development. That clears the admission bar for a preprint with real research evidence.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is an arXiv-style research manuscript with original empirical substance, including field observations of 13 experienced developers and a qualitative survey of 99 experienced developers, plus explicit study design, recruitment criteria, procedures, and reported findings about real-world AI agent use in software development.
